seoDescription: Interactive text to music playground tooling with unified API keys, usage tracking, and deployment-ready outputs.

elements.text: Use real request/response flows, tune inputs, and validate output quality before shipping to production workloads.

hero.heading: Text To Music Playground
hero.body: Generate instrumentals, motifs, and stems from natural language prompts. Test prompts, inspect responses, and move from prototype to API integration in minutes.

sections.title: Build A Reliable Workflow
sections.body: Run iterative experiments with request history, deterministic controls, and reproducible outputs for your team.

cards.title: Prompt Iteration
cards.description: Tune input instructions and compare outputs quickly to find a stable baseline.

cards.title: Output Inspection
cards.description: Inspect payload shape, latency, and token usage before promoting to production.

cards.title: API Handoff
cards.description: Convert successful experiments into reusable API requests with minimal rework.

sections.title: From Playground To Production
sections.body: Move from exploratory usage to governed traffic with the same API key model and routing layer.

cards.title: Guardrails
cards.description: Enforce rate limits and budget controls before exposure to end users.

cards.title: Use-Case Patterns
cards.description: Adopt implementation patterns validated across common AI workloads.

cards.title: Team Enablement
cards.description: Share tested configurations across product, engineering, and operations teams.

contactPanel.heading: Need help implementing this workflow?
contactPanel.body: Our team can help scope the right model mix, guardrails, and rollout strategy for production adoption.
contactPanel.responseTime: Typical response in under one business day
